meta.title: Polarete — life in balance
meta.description: An app that helps you stay balanced across work, health, sport, relationships, play and growth. AI suggestions, gamification, real outcomes.

hero.title: Manage every area of your life from one place.
hero.subtitle: Tasks, goals, rituals — across 6 life areas (health, sport, work, relationships, play, growth). AI learns you and suggests where to focus today.

features.title: Everything you need to live consciously
features.subtitle: Polarete combines the best of task managers, habit trackers and journaling — into one coherent system.

balanceWheel.title: Balance Wheel
balanceWheel.body: A visual radar of 6 areas of your life. See where you invest energy and where you need to close the gap — at a glance.

spaces.title: 6 Life Areas
spaces.body: Health, sport, work, relationships, play, growth. Every task, goal and ritual has a home — these aren't tags, they're a philosophy.

gamification.title: Gamification that makes sense
gamification.body: Energy, achievements, streaks and quests. No childish badges — just mechanics that genuinely fuel persistence.

ai.title: AI that actually knows you
ai.body: Embeddings + topic graph + procrastination detection. Polarete learns your patterns and suggests what to plan, when to rest and when to push.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps to a life where everything is in balance.

steps.title: 1. Choose your areas
steps.body: Set the weights of the 6 life areas. Polarete adapts its suggestions and metrics to what matters to you.

steps.title: 2. Plan and act
steps.body: Create tasks, goals and rituals. AI suggests where to focus — you decide what you actually do.

steps.title: 3. Watch yourself grow
steps.body: Balance Wheel shows your weekly progress. You see your balance growing — not just a count of closed tasks.

pricing.title: Simple and fair
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Pay only when you feel the value.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: The whole core loop. No time limits.
features: Goals and rituals — up to 5 active

items.a: Plan: first public build in Q3 2026. The waitlist gets early access 2–4 weeks before launch.

items.q: Which platforms does Polarete run on?
items.a: Web (browser) and Desktop (macOS, Windows, Linux). Mobile is on the roadmap after MVP.
Yes. Supabase backend with Row Level Security, EU hosting. GDPR-compliant, with full data export and deletion on request. Full privacy policy before launch.

items.q: How is Polarete different from Notion / Todoist / Habitica?
items.a: Those tools solve a single problem. Polarete unites tasks, goals, rituals and balance into one system where AI understands the context of your whole life — not just one to-do list.

items.q: Does AI have access to my data?
items.a: Only yours and only to help you. Embeddings live in your database, prompts go through our proxy, your data never trains anyone's model.
